functions.label: CodeEditor
description: Renders a Monaco code editor with EUI color theme.

functions.label: CodeEditorField
description: Renders a Monaco code editor in the same style as other EUI form fields.

functions.label: getUndoRedoService
description:
Returns Monaco's internal IUndoRedoService for pushing custom undo/redo elements
that interleave with text edits on the same per-resource stack.

Returns undefined if the service is not available (e.g., in test environments
or before Monaco is fully initialized).

children.label: width
description: Width of editor. Defaults to 100%.

children.label: height
description: Height of editor. Defaults to 100px.

children.label: languageId
description: ID of the editor language

children.label: value
description: Value of the editor

children.label: onChange
description: Function invoked when text in editor is changed

children.label: options
description:
Options for the Monaco Code Editor
Documentation of options can be found here:
https://microsoft.github.io/monaco-editor/docs.html#interfaces/editor.IStandaloneEditorConstructionOptions.html

children.label: suggestionProvider
description:
Suggestion provider for autocompletion
Documentation for the provider can be found here:
https://microsoft.github.io/monaco-editor/docs.html#interfaces/languages.CompletionItemProvider.html

children.label: signatureProvider
description:
Signature provider for function parameter info
Documentation for the provider can be found here:
https://microsoft.github.io/monaco-editor/docs.html#interfaces/languages.SignatureHelpProvider.html

children.label: hoverProvider
description:
Hover provider for hover documentation
Documentation for the provider can be found here:
https://microsoft.github.io/monaco-editor/docs.html#interfaces/languages.HoverProvider.html

children.label: inlineCompletionsProvider
description:
Inline completions provider for inline suggestions
Documentation for the provider can be found here:
https://microsoft.github.io/monaco-editor/docs.html#interfaces/languages.InlineCompletionsProvider.html

children.label: languageConfiguration
description:
Language config provider for bracket
Documentation for the provider can be found here:
https://microsoft.github.io/monaco-editor/docs.html#interfaces/languages.LanguageConfiguration.html

children.label: codeActions
description:
CodeAction provider for code actions on markers feedback
Documentation for the provider can be found here:
https://microsoft.github.io/monaco-editor/docs.html#interfaces/languages.CodeActionProvider.html

children.label: documentHighlightProvider
description:
Document highlight provider for highlighting all occurrences of a symbol
Documentation for the provider can be found here:
https://microsoft.github.io/monaco-editor/docs.html#interfaces/languages.DocumentHighlightProvider.html

children.label: editorWillMount
description: Function called before the editor is mounted in the view

children.label: overrideEditorWillMount
description:
Function called before the editor is mounted in the view
and completely replaces the setup behavior called by the component

children.label: editorDidMount
description: Function called after the editor is mounted in the view

children.label: transparentBackground
description: Should the editor use a transparent background

children.label: fullWidth
description: Should the editor be rendered using the fullWidth EUI attribute

children.label: 'aria-label'
description: Accessible name for the editor. (Defaults to "Code editor")

children.label: 'aria-describedby'
description: ID of the element that describes the editor.

children.label: readOnlyMessage
description: Alternate text to display, when an attempt is made to edit read only content. (Defaults to "Cannot edit in read-only editor")

children.label: fitToContent
description:
Enables the editor to grow vertically to fit its content.
This option overrides the `height` option.
signature: { minLines?: number | undefined; maxLines?: number | undefined; } | undefined

children.label: accessibilityOverlayEnabled
description: Enables the editor to get disabled when pressing ESC to resolve focus trapping for accessibility.

children.label: enableFindAction
description: Enables the Search bar functionality in the editor. Disabled by default.

children.label: classNameCss
description: Custom CSS class to apply to the container

children.label: enableCustomContextMenu
description: Enables a custom context menu with Cut, Copy, Paste actions. Disabled by default.

children.label: customContextMenuActions
description:
If the custom context menu is enable through {@link enableCustomContextMenu},
this prop allows adding more custom menu actions, on top of the default Cut, Copy, and Paste actions.

children.label: htmlId
description: Optional html id for accessibility labeling

children.label: links
description:
Enables clickable links in the editor. URLs will be underlined and can be opened
in a new tab using Cmd/Ctrl+Click. Disabled by default.

children.label: onFocus
description: Callbacks for when editor is focused/blurred

children.label: languageThemeResolver
signature: .ITokenThemeRule | { token: string; foreground: string; fontStyle: string; })[]; colors: { 'editorLineNumber.foreground': string; }; base:

children.label: validate
signature: | undefined, options?: { invalidateColumnsCache?: boolean | undefined; } | undefined) => Promise<{ errors:
